headlines.description: Crystal Palace were held to a goalless draw by Fulham in the Premier League on Saturday at Selhurst Park in a game short on quality and cutting edge.
headlines.shortLinkText: Palace held by Fulham in goalless stalemate

headlines.description: Luton Town should have beaten Wolverhampton Wanderers in the Premier League on Saturday, manager Rob Edwards said, and it was only a matter of time before the promoted club claimed their first win of the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Luton off the mark with draw vs. 10-man Wolves

headlines.description: Manchester City maintained their perfect start to the Premier League season with a 2-0 home win over Nottingham Forest on Saturday, making it six wins out of six despite losing midfielder Rodri to a red card early in the second half.
headlines.shortLinkText: City ease past Forest, stay perfect despite red

headlines.description: Everton celebrated a breakthrough first victory of the Premier League season at Brentford on Saturday with James Tarkowski scoring against his former club in a well-deserved 3-1 win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Everton beat Brentford for first PL win of season

headlines.description: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes struck a sublime volley to earn a 1-0 victory at Burnley in the Premier League on Saturday as Erik ten Hag's side ended a three-match losing streak in all competitions.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fernandes stunner gives Man Utd needed win
